title.en: The Frontier Lord looked at the big black tree ...

content.en:
"That's the tree!"

The Frontier Lord looked at the big black tree in front of him.

This big tree is not too big, but its aura is very strange, and the branches on its body are like tentacles, spreading in all directions of time and space, and constantly writhing.

"The power of destruction!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The border lord nodded: "Yes, what this big tree has is the power of destruction, in fact, it is the power of destruction that extends from time and space and causes mutation, our defense is easily shattered by this power of destruction, and even our bodies are difficult to resist the invasion of the power of destruction. Endless Lord, let's not think about killing it, its defense is terrifying, even more difficult to kill than the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, so our task is to rush over 100 million"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian is not stupid, he will not think that he has the strength to kill this big tree.

"Let's go!"

The Frontier Lord said.

Wow!!!

Ye Tian and the Border Lord rushed forward in an instant

At this moment, the countless branches of the big tree shattered layer by layer.

"Thousand True Bodies!"

Ye Tian used this space-time supreme technique, and his body became extremely huge, blocking a large number of branches.

The other two replica bodies rushed towards as fast as they could.

Click!!

The Thousand Dao True Body withstood too many attacks and began to crumble.

Ye Tian himself is the supreme legendary body, so after condensing the supreme body of time and space, his defense is very terrifying, and with the addition of the Thousand Dao True Body, the defense is even stronger.

But even so, he still couldn't bear it.

Soon, the replica body was completely shattered.

But at this moment, Ye Tian's other two replica bodies were walking in the void at great speed, joining forces with the border lords, and they were about to rush out of this area.

"Finally, the critical plane has arrived!"

Ye Tian and the border lord realized in their hearts.

This tree will also have a big move, and if this ultimate move can't be stopped, they will be completely destroyed.

Rumble!!!!

Time and space froze, and countless branches condensed into a giant hand, directly holding this area, and the clones of Ye Tian and the border lord were all here, and they were held and pinched,

This area was directly crushed, and the power of this blow was comparable to the full force of the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Ye Tian burst out with all his might with a copy body, burning everything to use his sword to slash three bodies and the attack of the border lord was reasonable, tearing a gap, and letting his last copy body rush out.

And the border lord also had a doppelganger rush out alive.

......

In an unfamiliar area, Ye Tian and Lord Yu are both alive and ugly, and the other two clones have fallen

At this moment, they were out of the realm of the big tree and would not be attacked.

But what exactly is in these later areas, the border lords don't know.

"This big tree is too terrifying, if it weren't for the fact that it couldn't move, it would be comparable to a true fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord. Ye Tian commented.

"yes, if it could move, I wouldn't dare come here!"

Frontier Lord's Road.

"Let's recover from our injuries first, and then explore this place when we recover!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Hmm!"

The Frontier Lord nodded.

After a period of time, both recovered from their injuries.

Then, they flew slowly, after all, everything here is very unfamiliar, once they fall here, there is no way to come back in a short time, after all, it will take a long time for the border lord to condense the clone again, and the price to pay is also great.

Therefore, the border lords did not dare to mess around.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian and the border lord shuttled through the silent void, and finally encountered a different place.

"Sea of Flowers!"

In the distance, a sea of flowers emerged, and this sea of flowers was also very weird, suspended in the void like this, definitely not an ordinary sea of flowers.

"Avatar go over and take a look. "

Ye Tian proposed.

"Hmm!"

The border lord immediately condensed an avatar and flew over with Ye Tian's avatar.

But before he got close to the sea of flowers, a floral fragrance spread over, and the two avatars were directly shattered.

"It's really dangerous!"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

Although their incarnation was not powerful, it was annihilated in an instant, and the fragrance of this flower was extremely strange.

"This flower can affect our willpower, the willpower of the incarnation is too weak to bear it at all, do you want to give it a try?"

Once it fell, it was a complete failure this time.

But if this sea of flowers is a chance, if you don't try it, it will be a pity.

There are so few opportunities that can be useful to them, even if there is little hope, they have to give it a try.

At this time, Ye Tian said: "That's it, wait for me to condense a clone, and then try again." My condensation doppelganger is relatively low-cost, and it's fast. "

"Condense the clones here?"

The Frontier Lord was shocked.

If he wants to condense the doppelganger again, he needs at least hundreds of eternal epochs, and it takes a lot of resources, and he needs to divide the will, and it will take a long time to recover.

Not only him, but also other peak Legendary Realm lords were roughly the same.

Ye Tian recondensed his clone, how fast could he be?

"Endless Lord, how long will it take you to condense a clone, if it's too long, I'll take the risk of giving it a try," the Frontier Lord said.

"It won't be long before an Eternal Era at most!"

Ye Tian said.

Actually, he can condense it in a moment, but he can't say that, so he says a little bit more about time.

"Soon, just wait. "

The Frontier Lord said.

Ye Tian then began to pretend to condense the clone, but in fact he went to cultivate.

And the ontology of the border lord is also beginning to condense (Li Lihao) to gather the clone, and time passes slowly.

After an eternal epoch.

Ye Tian instantly condensed the copy body, and then the copy body walked out of the body.

"Border lord, the doppelganger has condensed 100 million"

Ye Tian reminded.

"Okay, then trouble the Endless Lord to send a clone to try it, if it's too dangerous, let's go directly to other places to have a look. "The Frontier Lord said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and immediately copied his body and flew towards the sea of flowers.

When approaching the sea of flowers, the fragrance of the sea of flowers spreads.

Ye Tian originally wanted to stop the spread of the aroma and wanted to absorb a trace of aroma research, but he couldn't stop it at all.

The half-step eighth-order will constantly resists the invasion of the fragrance of flowers, and although it is very difficult, it can still resist it.

"Yes, you should be able to enter the sea of flowers to support for a while. "

Ye Tian judged the Dao level. _
